name: Tigris
description: The double-barreled Tigris shotgun fires two bursts in rapid succession, easily taking down the toughest prey.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The double-barreled Tigris shotgun fires two bursts in rapid succession, easily taking down the toughest prey.

Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

Ancient energy cell from the Orokin era.

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed interrupting Sancti Tigris mid-reload leaving floating cartridges in the air.

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.changes: Contains Euphrates Pet Armor for both Kubrow and Kavat, modeled on the intimidating, bladed look of the Tigris Shotgun.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.7.0 + 24.7.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Over 20 Melee and Primary weapons/Skins have received the PBR treatment! From Candy Cane Scythe to Tigris, our art team has been updating our back catalog!

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tigris firing when doing a roll animation.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.20.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tigris no longer having its PBR textures.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing muzzle flash on the Tigris Prime.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.6.0 + 20.6.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Sancti Tigris Health buff not working for Clients and only lasting 10 seconds in total for the Host.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: Update 1
patchlogs.changes: Removed a delay intended to fix frame rate when auto reloading a weapon. This primarily affected the Vectis and Tigris due to frequent reloading.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: Hotfix 3 (Nekros Prime!)
patchlogs.changes:
including Nekros Prime, Tigris Prime, Galatine Prime, and exclusive Customizations only available through Prime Access!
The new Relics added that contain Nekros Prime, Tigris Prime, and Galatine Prime now contain a mix of the unvaulted items from the above removed Relics.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.13.0: TennoGen, Passives, & Reworks
patchlogs.changes: •    Changed the Fatal Acceleration Mod to display a Drakgoon instead of a Tigris.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.3.0
patchlogs.fixes:
New Loka: Sancti Tigris 
Echo nature's violent beauty with this special Tigris.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.9.0
patchlogs.changes: Improved the visual tint on the Tigris.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.5.6
patchlogs.changes: Increased the damage of the Tigris in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.4
patchlogs.changes: The following weapons have now been balanced for use in PvP: Sybaris, Karak, Kraken, Viper, Angstrum, AKViper, WraithViper and Tigris.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.11
patchlogs.fixes: Damage multipliers for the Amprex, Brakk, Drakgoon, Karak, Hind, Marelok, Mutalist Quanta, Tysis, AkLato, Burston Prime, Lato, Braton, Tetra, Tigris all normalized (no more arbitrary multipliers).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.9.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Specter's firing rate on the Tigris being incorrect.

patchlogs.name: Update 12: Zephyr Rises
patchlogs.changes: Tigris now has improved damage, critical chance, and proc rate.

patchlogs.name: Update 11.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Damage and range buff for Tigris

patchlogs.name: Update 11.1.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue with Tigris where second shot would be fired upon melee, weapon switch, landing a jump, or roll dodging. Performing any of these actions will now cancel the loaded shot from semi automatic behaviour.
